---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for D-School 2049
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Summary

A concise description of the feature (1-2 sentences).

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## User Story

> As a **[role]**, I want to **[action]** so that **[benefit]**.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Affected Roles

- [ ] Admin / School Leader
- [ ] Teacher
- [ ] Student
- [ ] Parent
- [ ] Finance
- [ ] Marketing
- [ ] Provider

## Scope

### In Scope

- Item 1
- Item 2

### Out of Scope

- Item 1

## Design / Mockups

Attach any wireframes, mockups, or design references.

## Technical Considerations

- **API changes needed**: Yes / No — describe
- **Database schema changes**: Yes / No — describe
- **3rd party integrations**: List any external services
- **Performance impact**: Expected load / data volume

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — Must have (launch blocker)
- [ ] P1 — Should have (next sprint)
- [ ] P2 — Nice to have (backlog)
- [ ] P3 — Future consideration

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references.
